import json, re, unicodedata, os, textwrap

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"

def load_json(path):
    with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        return json.load(f)

quran = load_json(quran_path)
hadith = load_json(hadith_path)
len(quran), len(hadith)

# Let's search for occurrences of key words in hadith
import pandas as pd

def normalize(s):
    if not isinstance(s, str): 
        return ""
    s = re.sub(r'[\u064B-\u0652]', '', s)  # remove diacritics
    s = s.replace('ـ', '')  # tatweel
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]+', ' ', s)  # remove punctuation
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ى','ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

hadith_texts = []
for i, h in enumerate(hadith):
    matn = h.get('hadithTxt') or h.get('Matn') or ""
    hadith_texts.append((i, matn))

# Search terms
query = "قُتِلَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ عُزَّى جَلا جَلَالُهُ مِنْ قَومٍ كَثُرَ عَلَيْهِمْ النُصُب"
q_norm = normalize(query)

candidates = []
for i, matn in hadith_texts:
    n = normalize(matn)
    if all(tok in n for tok in q_norm.split()[:3]):  # rough filter
        candidates.append((i, matn))

len(candidates)

# Inspect the hadith record around index 5402 to view fields and keys
idx = 5402
record = hadith[idx]
record.keys(), record

content.text: {"correction":"أَنَّهُ لَقِيَ زَيْدَ بْنَ عَمْرِو بْنِ نُفَيْلٍ بِأَسْفَلِ بَلْدَحٍ ، وَذَاكَ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَنْزِلَ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ الْوَحْيُ ، فَقَدَّمَ إِلَيْهِ رَسُولُ اللهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ سُفْرَةً فِيهَا لَحْمٌ فَأَبَى أَنْ يَأْكُلَ مِنْهَا ، ثُمَّ قَالَ: إِنِّي لَا آكُلُ مِمَّا تَذْبَحُونَ عَلَى أَنْصَابِكُمْ ، وَلَا آكُلُ إِلَّا مِمَّا ذُكِرَ اسْمُ اللهِ عَلَيْهِ . "}
